config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Dropbox Sign
2. Go to Settings → Integrations → API
3. Copy your API key
4. Run: echo -n 'YOUR_API_KEY:' | base64
5. Paste the output below

credentialFields.label: Basic Auth Token
credentialFields.helpText: Base64-encode your API key with a colon: echo -n 'your_api_key:' | base64

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Lists Dropbox Sign team members to verify access
